output_format.label: Skill output format
output_format.description: directory = full smart skill with assets/, references/, evals/. single-file = standalone SKILL.md only.

include_evals.label: Include evals
include_evals.description: Whether to generate evals/evals.json with test cases for the skill.

registry_namespace.label: Registry namespace
registry_namespace.description: Default namespace for ship publish (e.g. 'myorg'). Empty means personal namespace.
